# Support

## FR

### Ce que ce depot supporte

Ce projet supporte deux usages:

- le workflow historique shell-first
- l'application MVP a triple parcours en evolution

### Ou regarder en premier

- `README.md`
- `docs/APPROCHE_ARCHITECTURE_EXHAUSTIVE.md`
- `ARCHITECTURE_TARGET.md`
- `docs/DEVOPS_RBOK_ADAPTATION.md`
- `docs/adr/README.md`
- `REPRENDRE_SESSION.md`

### Questions typiques

Je veux lancer le MVP localement:

```bash
./scripts/start_api.sh
./scripts/start_ai_gateway.sh
./scripts/start_web.sh
```

Je veux seulement le workflow shell d'origine:

- `progression.json`
- `scripts/start_42_mentor_env.sh`
- `REPRENDRE_SESSION.md`

Je veux comprendre l'architecture:

- `docs/APPROCHE_ARCHITECTURE_EXHAUSTIVE.md`
- `AGENTS.md`
- `CLAUDE.md`
- `docs/adr/`

### Limites du support

Ce repo n'a pas vocation a fournir:

- des solutions de projets sans limite
- des contournements du processus d'apprentissage 42
- une extraction directe de reponses depuis des repos de solutions

### Avant de demander de l'aide

Merci d'inclure:

- ce que tu as essaye
- ce que tu attendais
- ce qui s'est vraiment passe
- les logs utiles ou la sortie de commande qui echoue

## EN

### What this repository supports

This project supports two use cases:

- the historical shell-first preparation workflow
- the evolving triple-track MVP application

### Where to look first

- `README.md`
- `docs/APPROCHE_ARCHITECTURE_EXHAUSTIVE.md`
- `ARCHITECTURE_TARGET.md`
- `docs/DEVOPS_RBOK_ADAPTATION.md`
- `docs/adr/README.md`
- `REPRENDRE_SESSION.md`

### Typical questions

I want to run the MVP locally:

```bash
./scripts/start_api.sh
./scripts/start_ai_gateway.sh
./scripts/start_web.sh
```

I only want the original shell workflow:

- `progression.json`
- `scripts/start_42_mentor_env.sh`
- `REPRENDRE_SESSION.md`

I want to understand the architecture:

- `docs/APPROCHE_ARCHITECTURE_EXHAUSTIVE.md`
- `AGENTS.md`
- `CLAUDE.md`
- `docs/adr/`

### Support boundaries

This repository is not intended to provide:

- unrestricted project solutions
- bypasses of the 42 learning process
- direct answer extraction from solution repositories

### Before asking for help

Please include:

- what you tried
- what you expected
- what actually happened
- relevant logs or failing command output
